def solve(nums : Array(Int64), k : Int64) : Int64
    nums.sort!
    n = nums.length
    max_len = 0
    for i in 0..n-1
        target = nums[i] * k
        left = i
        right = n - 1
        j = i - 1
        while left <= right
            mid = (left + right) / 2
            if nums[mid] <= target
                j = mid
                left = mid + 1
            else
                right = mid - 1
            end
        end
        current_len = j - i + 1
        if current_len > max_len
            max_len = current_len
        end
    end
    return n - max_len
end
```

end
